filament.rationale: Standard torture-test material; print after the calibration cube reads true.

source: Imported CC0 model — see NOTICE. bbox 60 x 31 x 48 mm, fits the bed.
notes: Benchmark only (do not orient/scale). ~100 min at 15% infill, ~4.2 m PLA. Inspect overhangs, bridging, the funnel hole, and hull text.
